goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'golden wok'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'kings lynn' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should 'arrive by 09:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'departure time', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called golden wok
Make sure you get address, postcode, and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from kings lynn and should leave on thursday
The train should arrive by 09:00 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get price, departure time, and travel time
